/usr/bin/clang++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/luaud.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/luaud.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/luaud.dir/luau_runtime.cpp.o -o luaud  ../luau/libLuau.VM.a ../luau/libLuau.Compiler.a ../luau/libLuau.CLI.lib.a ../luau/libLuau.Config.a ../debugger/libLuau.Debugger.a ../luau/libLuau.VM.a ../luau/libLuau.Compiler.a ../luau/libLuau.Ast.a ../luau/libLuau.Common.a ../cppdap/libcppdap.a -lpthread
